finding_results.notes: Revised both cited thesis-speeches. It's the same damn thing'), breaking the neat parallel into a pressure repetition with profanity; the ending drops the tidy 'call it handled' formulation for the rougher 'you're both just standing here shoving it in a drawer.' At line 525, the preamble thesis ('This is what we do on this ship') is removed and replaced with an aborted summary after the three-part list ('That's just—'), showing Faye starting to name the pattern and failing to land the formulation before pivoting to the concrete consequence. Both revisions preserve anger, specificity, and high-contraction register while converting composed thesis-speech into pressure-roughened dialogue with visible interruptions. The two cited speeches no longer form consecutive polished parallel-clause summaries.
